member.name: T:MauiLearn.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions
member.summary: Common string helper extensions for positional and value-based replacements. Designed to be small, safe, and easy to read.

member.name: M:MauiLearn.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceAt(System.String,System.Int32,System.Char)
member.summary: Replaces the character at the specified index with .

member.name: M:MauiLearn.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceRange(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces a range of characters starting at with . If replacement is null it is treated as empty string.

member.name: M:MauiLearn.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceFirst(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurrence of with . If search is null or empty the original string is returned.

member.name: M:MauiLearn.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceLast(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces the last occurrence of with . If search is null or empty the original string is returned.

member.name: M:MauiLearn.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceAtMany(System.String,System.Int32[],System.Char[])
member.summary: Replaces characters at multiple indices with the corresponding characters in . Indices and replacements arrays must be the same length. This method uses a single char[] allocation and is efficient for a handful of edits.

member.name: M:MauiLearn.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceLimit(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Replaces all occurrences of with but only up to . If maxReplacements is null or less than 1, all occurrences are replaced.

member.name: M:MauiLearn.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions.Replace(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Convenience overload for String.Replace with StringComparison. Replaces all occurrences using the provided comparison.
